CVE-2021-1076.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, all versions, co ...
CVE-2021-1076.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, all versions, contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer (nvlddmkm.sys or nvidia.ko) where improper access control may lead to denial of service, information disclosure, or data corruption.

CVE-2021-1077.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, R450 and R460 dr ...
CVE-2021-1077.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux, R450 and R460 driver branch, contains a vulnerability where the software uses a reference count to manage a resource that is incorrectly updated, which may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2021-1093.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulner ...
CVE-2021-1093.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulnerability in firmware where the driver contains an assert() or similar statement that can be triggered by an attacker, which leads to an application exit or other behavior that is more severe than necessary, and may lead to denial of service or system crash.

CVE-2021-1094.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulner ...
CVE-2021-1094.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer (nvlddmkm.sys) handler for DxgkDdiEscape where an out of bounds array access may lead to denial of service or information disclosure.

CVE-2021-1095.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulner ...
CVE-2021-1095.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer (nvlddmkm.sys) handlers for all control calls with embedded parameters where dereferencing an untrusted pointer may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2022-28181.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulner ...
CVE-2022-28181.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer, where an unprivileged regular user on the network can cause an out-of-bounds write through a specially crafted shader, which may lead to code execution, denial of service, escalation of privileges, information disclosure, and data tampering. The scope of the impact may extend to other components.

CVE-2022-28183.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulner ...
CVE-2022-28183.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer, where an unprivileged regular user can cause an out-of-bounds read, which may lead to denial of service and information disclosure.

CVE-2022-28184.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulner ...
CVE-2022-28184.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulnerability in the kernel mode layer (nvlddmkm.sys) handler for DxgkDdiEscape, where an unprivileged regular user can access administrator- privileged registers, which may lead to denial of service, information disclosure, and data tampering.

CVE-2022-28185.title: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulner ...
CVE-2022-28185.summary: NVIDIA GPU Display Driver for Windows and Linux contains a vulnerability in the ECC layer, where an unprivileged regular user can cause an out-of-bounds write, which may lead to denial of service and data tampering.

CVE-2022-28191.title: NVIDIA vGPU software contains a vulnerability in the Virtual GPU  ...
CVE-2022-28191.summary: NVIDIA vGPU software contains a vulnerability in the Virtual GPU Manager (nvidia.ko), where uncontrolled resource consumption can be triggered by an unprivileged regular user, which may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2022-28192.title: NVIDIA vGPU software contains a vulnerability in the Virtual GPU  ...
CVE-2022-28192.summary: NVIDIA vGPU software contains a vulnerability in the Virtual GPU Manager (nvidia.ko), where it may lead to a use-after-free, which in turn may cause denial of service. This attack is complex to carry out because the attacker needs to have control over freeing some host side resources out of sequence, which requires elevated privileges.
